description:
- Developed and maintained internal applications used primarily by Network engineers
- Developed containerized Microservices using Spring-Boot, FastAPI
- Built and deployed Docker images to AKS for efficient application management
- Integrated applications with CI/CD, APM tools to streamline development and maintenance processes
- Developed AI workflows leveraging LangGraph, RAG and LLM

- Involved in building web applications for the internal use for the company using Angular, SpringBoot, Docker
- Learned Agile development methodologies
- Gained foundational understanding of DevOps practices
- Cloud deployment strategies
